title: prunus padus var. padus
intro: Prunus padus var. padus, also known as Bird Cherry or May Cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its white flowers and dark red fruit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Prunus padus var. padus include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and supporting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in salves and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
